title: rubus leptaleus
intro: Rubus leptaleus, also known as the thimbleberry, is a perennial shrub native to North America. Its medicinal properties lie in its leaves, stems, and roots, which contain antioxidants and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Rubus leptaleus include its potential to aid in digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Rubus leptaleus can be found in teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to support overall health and wellness.
